scripts.css:base: sass --style expanded --no-source-map assets/sass/style.scss style.css && postcss style.css --no-map --use autoprefixer -o style.css
scripts.css:blocks: sass --style expanded --no-source-map assets/sass/blocks.scss assets/css/blocks.css && postcss assets/css/blocks.css --no-map --use autoprefixer -o assets/css/blocks.css
scripts.css:editor: sass --style expanded --no-source-map assets/sass/style-editor.scss assets/css/style-editor.css && postcss assets/css/style-editor.css --no-map --use autoprefixer -o assets/css/style-editor.css
scripts.css:shop: sass --style expanded --no-source-map assets/sass/woocommerce.scss assets/css/woocommerce.css && postcss assets/css/woocommerce.css --no-map --use autoprefixer -o assets/css/woocommerce.css
scripts.css: npm run css:base && npm run css:blocks && npm run css:editor && npm run css:shop
scripts.terser: terser assets/js/customize-color-control.js -c -m -o assets/js/customize-color-control.min.js && terser assets/js/customize-preview.js -c -m -o assets/js/customize-preview.min.js && terser assets/js/functions.js -c -m -o assets/js/functions.min.js && terser assets/js/navigation.js -c -m -o assets/js/navigation.min.js && terser assets/js/scroll-to-top.js -c -m -o assets/js/scroll-to-top.min.js
